UsedTo: It is used to refer to the opposition of misogynist men to women's rights.

It is used to describe World War I.
It is used to assert that women and men should have different roles and rights owing to fundamental differences between them.
It is used to justify male domination in society.

It is used to refer to the ideology of patriarchy.
It is used to refer to a form of antifeminism.
